```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;text-align:center;">

 <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.18em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.3em;">practice 02</div>
 <div style="font-size:1.3em;font-weight:700;line-height:1;margin-bottom:0.85em;letter-spacing:-0.01em;">
  Turn <span style="color:#2C8475;">subjective</span> judgments into <span style="color:#C4881A;">gradable</span> criteria.
 </div>

 <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.5em;">example · frontend rubric</div>

 <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.35em;text-align:left;">

  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:8em 4em 1fr;gap:0.7em;align-items:center;background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 0.85em;border-left:3px solid #5654A2;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#5654A2;font-weight:700;">Design quality</div>
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.3em;">
    <div style="background:#5654A2;height:0.5em;width:25%;border-radius:4px;"></div>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#5654A2;font-weight:700;">25%</span>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;">Layout, hierarchy, contrast</div>
  </div>

  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:8em 4em 1fr;gap:0.7em;align-items:center;background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 0.85em;border-left:3px solid #2C8475;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#2C8475;font-weight:700;">Originality</div>
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.3em;">
    <div style="background:#2C8475;height:0.5em;width:20%;border-radius:4px;"></div>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#2C8475;font-weight:700;">20%</span>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;">Not a generic template</div>
  </div>

  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:8em 4em 1fr;gap:0.7em;align-items:center;background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 0.85em;border-left:3px solid #C4881A;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#C4881A;font-weight:700;">Craft</div>
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.3em;">
    <div style="background:#C4881A;height:0.5em;width:25%;border-radius:4px;"></div>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#C4881A;font-weight:700;">25%</span>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;">Spacing, typography, micro-interactions</div>
  </div>

  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:8em 4em 1fr;gap:0.7em;align-items:center;background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 0.85em;border-left:3px solid #D45F47;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#D45F47;font-weight:700;">Functionality</div>
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.3em;">
    <div style="background:#D45F47;height:0.5em;width:30%;border-radius:4px;"></div>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#D45F47;font-weight:700;">30%</span>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;">Features actually work end-to-end</div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.7em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#9B8EA0;font-style:italic;">
  calibrate with <span style="color:#5654A2;font-weight:700;">few-shot examples</span> — 2–3 outputs with annotated scores.
 </div>

</div>
```
